# GitHub Copilot Instructions — Apple Agentic Swift 2026

Use `AGENTS.md` and `rules/` as persistent project instructions.

Generate Swift code that is:

- SwiftUI-first for new UI.
- Swift 6-ready and concurrency-safe.
- Local-first for AI features, using Foundation Models where available.
- Exposed through App Intents/App Shortcuts/AppEntity when system discovery matters.
- Fruta-style for multiplatform app/widget/App Clip architecture.
- Covered by Swift Testing/XCTest/UI automation/evals.
- Privacy/App Review-ready.

Do not add cloud AI, analytics, prompt logging, broad permissions, ATS exceptions, or third-party packages without explicit instruction.
